national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Gold Buyer OK (Dakota Financial)
buyers.payout_claims: Publishes current gold buy pricing by karat (10kt–24kt, per gram and per troy ounce); "our commitment to you is offering you the highest possible cash for gold of all the Oklahoma City gold buyers"
buyers.testing_transparency: "Evaluations... right in front of you"; most gold and silver appraisals take about 10 minutes — equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: The only OKC buyer found posting a per-karat price table on its own site; Oklahoma precious-metals license PM001492 in the footer; "You are never obligated to accept our cash offer." Walk-ins welcome, appointments for large lots; also buys diamonds, coins, bullion, even mineral rights. Hours not posted.

buyers.name: OKC Gold Buyers
buyers.address: 7390 S Walker Ave, Suite H, Oklahoma City, OK 73139
buyers.payout_claims: "top dollar" / "fair price" positioning — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: References acid testing (blog post "The Acid Test"); process not detailed on the main page.
buyers.evidence_notes: "Fully licensed and bonded" with published Oklahoma precious-metal license #PM007694 and a claimed BBB A-rating; office-style transactions (testimonials mention appointments and 15-minute visits); "our smallest purchase has been $1.00 and our largest purchase has been $55,000.00." Hours shown only as an image, not text.

buyers.name: Coin & Gold Exchange
buyers.address: 7714 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73116
buyers.payout_claims: "we will give you the most value for your gold" and "offer you the best possible price" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described; site promises a "detailed appraisal, explaining every part of the process."
buyers.evidence_notes: North May Ave shop, over 25 years in business; "licensed precious metals experts" (license number not shown); pays on the spot in cash, check, or debit card; buys jewelry, collectible and bullion coins, scrap in any condition; walk-in ("Stop by or contact us"). Also operates goldexchangeoklahomacity.com (same phone).

buyers.name: Silver & Gold Cash Buyer
buyers.address: 711 S Broadway, Suite B, Edmond, OK 73034
buyers.payout_claims: "Competitive, Market based Offers"; "Our payouts are based on current market pricing" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "We clearly explain how weight, purity, and market price factor into your offer" — equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Edmond (north OKC metro) buyer citing "over 20 years in precious metals industry"; walk-in implied ("the moment you walk in"); no hours, license number, or rate schedule posted.

buyers.name: Absolute Diamond and Gold Buyers
buyers.testing_transparency: Not verified — site unreachable to automated fetch at research time.
buyers.evidence_notes: Licensed Oklahoma precious-metals dealer, license #PM007511 (BBB profile); in business since 2014, owner Will Miller; buys gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, coins, watches for the OKC/Edmond metro. Own website refused connections during research — all fields from BBB/business listings, confirm on-site.

buyers.name: Browns Coins & Stamps
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned coin shop "in the business since 1942"; carries gold and silver bullion and offers "FREE appraisals by appointment" (bank, estate, insurance). Own homepage does not explicitly state it buys scrap gold from the public — buy-side attested only in third-party coin-shop directories, so confirm before routing sellers.
